query:
ALTER TABLE realizedGains 
ADD COLUMN currency VARCHAR(8) DEFAULT 'CHF',
ADD COLUMN stockGainLocal DECIMAL(15, 2) DEFAULT 0,
ADD COLUMN fxGain DECIMAL(15, 2) DEFAULT 0,
ADD COLUMN buyFxRate DECIMAL(10, 6) DEFAULT 1,
ADD COLUMN sellFxRate DECIMAL(10, 6) DEFAULT 1
